problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: The key to How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage? is Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor — specifically Synaptic plasticity modulation — which would help 50,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 16 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
